text.title: AI-Generated Test Validation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the ai-generated-test-validation artefact. Validator enforces the listed required fields + cross-field checks.

example.note: report_id pattern fails; verdict=pass with mutation_survival=0.4 violates mutation-survival-floor; rejections empty despite 18 tests with known issues.

list.item: verdict=pass with rejections empty when tests_inventoried > 0 AND mutation_survival < 0.85 (statistically implausible).
rule_violated outside the known rule ids.
